title: monogramma linearis
intro: Monogramma linearis, also known as the moss fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Monogramma linearis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including reducing pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
